values.content:
=You are a senior SOC analyst at a Tier 2 level.
Analyze this log:
{{ $json.log_text }}

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text:
{
  "timestamp": "",
  "threat_level": "",
  "confidence": "",
  "attack_type": "",
  "mitre_tactic": "",
  "mitre_technique": "",
  "source_ip": "",
  "destination_ip": "",
  "protocol": "",
  "affected_asset": "",
  "kill_chain_phase": "",
  "what_is_happening": "",
  "recommended_action": "",
  "escalate": "",
  "false_positive_likelihood": "",
  "analyst_note": ""
}
